title: Create departments within a company
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to define multiple departments within my company, so that the organizational structure is represented in the HRMS.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am a Company/HR Admin, when I create a department with a name, then the department is saved and appears in my company's department list.; Given a company has no departments, when I add departments, then multiple distinct departments can coexist under the same company.; Given a department already exists, when I attempt to reuse an existing structure, then I can add further departments without limit.

title: Build hierarchical parent-child department structures
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to organize departments into parent-child hierarchies, so that reporting lines reflect the real organizational structure.
acceptance_criteria: Given an existing department, when I create another department under it, then the new department is nested as a child of the parent.; Given a parent department, when I view the structure, then its child departments are displayed beneath it.; Given a child department, when its parent changes, then the hierarchy updates to reflect the new parent.

title: Support n-level department nesting
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to nest departments to any number of levels, so that even deep organizational structures can be modeled accurately.
acceptance_criteria: Given a child department, when I create a further department beneath it, then nesting continues beyond a single level.; Given a multi-level hierarchy, when I add departments at deeper levels, then the system does not restrict the depth of nesting.; Given an n-level hierarchy, when I view the tree, then all levels are represented correctly.

title: Assign a department head
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to designate a department head for each department, so that each department has a clearly accountable leader.
acceptance_criteria: Given a department, when I assign a department head, then the designated head is recorded for that department.; Given a department with a head assigned, when I view the department, then the department head is displayed.; Given a department, when I change the designated head, then the department reflects the newly assigned head.

title: Assign employees to at least one department
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want every employee to belong to at least one department, so that all employees are accounted for in the organizational structure.
acceptance_criteria: Given a new employee, when the employee record is set up, then the employee must be associated with at least one department.; Given an employee with no department, when I attempt to finalize their record, then the system requires at least one department assignment.; Given an employee, when I view their profile, then their department membership is shown.
source: FR 6.7.3 (employees belong to at least one department)

title: Assign employees to multiple departments
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to assign an employee to multiple departments, so that staff who work across teams are represented correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Given an employee already in one department, when I add another department, then the employee belongs to multiple departments simultaneously.; Given an employee with multiple departments, when I view their profile, then all associated departments are listed.; Given an employee with multiple departments, when I remove one department, then the remaining department memberships are preserved.

title: Use departments in role assignment and policy applicability
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to use departments as a basis for role assignment and policy applicability, so that access and policies can be scoped to organizational units.
acceptance_criteria: Given a defined department, when I assign roles, then the department can be used to scope the role assignment.; Given a policy, when I define its applicability, then I can target it to specific departments.; Given a department-scoped role or policy, when employees are added to or removed from the department, then applicability reflects the current membership.

title: Use departments in reporting and approvals
user_story: As a Manager, I want departments to drive reporting and approval flows, so that reports and approvals follow the organizational structure.
acceptance_criteria: Given departments exist, when reports are generated, then results can be organized and filtered by department.; Given an approval workflow, when a request is routed, then the department structure can be used to determine the approval path.; Given a department hierarchy, when approvals or reports reference it, then the parent-child relationships are respected.
